title: 00020_Cones_Concept_Neurons_in_Diffusion_Models_for_Customized_Generation
positive_examples: Reduces storage consumption by 90% compared to previous customized generation methods, making it environmentally friendly for large-scale applications.
Enables the generation of multiple subjects in a single image, enhancing creative possibilities in art and design.
Improves interpretability and manipulation of diffusion models, which can lead to better user experiences in applications like personalized content generation.
